name: Braised Tofu
recipeIngredient: assorted veggies: broccoli, carrot, mushroom, chopped finely cauliflower florets, zucchini flowerets
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the cubed tofu in the sauce mixture for at least one hour, or preferably longer.
2. Heat a frying pan over medium heat and add some of the sauce mixture.
3. Lay the tofu pieces flat in the pan.
4. Cook the tofu until the liquid is mostly gone, turning it halfway through cooking.
5. Combine all ingredients together and serve.
Note: Do not rush the cooking process by turning off the heat too quickly; allow the tofu to cook evenly for best results.
